  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Gene Expression Analysis

# Load necessary libraries
library(edgeR)
library(limma)      
library(pheatmap)   
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(viridis)      
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)  
library(ggplotify)  
library(grid)
library(ggpubr)
library(corrplot)
# Set Working Directory
setwd("/disk3/patil/winpro/I3-NGS-Daten/NGS-Fisch/Akshay/MALT/Bulk_RNASeq/")

# Load the gene expression count matrix
count_matrix <- read.table("featurecounts/filtered_counts.txt", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t")

# Load metadata 
metadata <- read.csv("samples_metadata.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Align samples
common_samples <- intersect(colnames(count_matrix), metadata$Sample)
if(length(common_samples) == 0) stop("ERROR: No common samples found.")

count_matrix <- count_matrix[, common_samples]
metadata <- metadata[match(common_samples, metadata$Sample), ]
# Normalization with edgeR

# Create a DGEList object for normalization
dge <- DGEList(counts = count_matrix)

# Calculate normalization factors using the TMM method
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")

# Get normalized and log-transformed counts (logCPM)
logcpm <- cpm(dge, normalized.lib.sizes = TRUE, log = TRUE)

# PCA - Check Batch Effects (BEFORE correction)

pca_before <- prcomp(t(logcpm), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_before <- as.data.frame(pca_before$x[,1:2]) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Sample") %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Sample")

var_explained_before <- round(100 * summary(pca_before)$importance[2, 1:2], 1)

p_pca_before <- ggplot(pca_df_before, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = Bioproject)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - Before Batch Correction",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", var_explained_before[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", var_explained_before[2], "%)")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# Batch Correction

batch_info <- metadata$Bioproject
design_matrix <- model.matrix(~metadata$Tissue)

# Handle Batch Correction
logcpm_corrected <- tryCatch({
  removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix)
}, warning = function(w) {
  message("Note: Batch correction warning (expected with confounded design). Proceeding...")
  suppressWarnings(removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Batch correction failed. Using raw data.")
  return(logcpm) 
})
Coefficients not estimable: batch1 batch2 batch3 
Coefficients not estimable: batch1 batch2 batch3 
# PCA - AFTER batch correction
pca_after <- prcomp(t(logcpm_corrected), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_after <- as.data.frame(pca_after$x[,1:2]) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Sample") %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Sample")

var_explained_after <- round(100 * summary(pca_after)$importance[2, 1:2], 1)

p_pca_after <- ggplot(pca_df_after, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = Bioproject)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - After Batch Correction",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", var_explained_after[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", var_explained_after[2], "%)")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# PCA - AFTER batch correction
pca_after <- prcomp(t(logcpm_corrected), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_after <- as.data.frame(pca_after$x[,1:2]) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Sample") %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Sample")

var_explained_after <- round(100 * summary(pca_after)$importance[2, 1:2], 1)

p_pca_after <- ggplot(pca_df_after, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Tissue, shape = Bioproject)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D") +
  labs(
    title = "PCA - After Batch Correction",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", var_explained_after[1], "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", var_explained_after[2], "%)")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# Save PCA comparison
pca_comparison <- p_pca_before + p_pca_after + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Batch Effect Assessment",
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)))

ggsave("PCA_Comparison.png", plot = pca_comparison, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
print(pca_comparison)

# Filter Target Genes 
target_genes <- c("malt1", "malt2", "malt3")

# Robust gene matching (case-insensitive)
found_genes <- rownames(logcpm_corrected)[
  tolower(rownames(logcpm_corrected)) %in% tolower(target_genes)
]

if(length(found_genes) == 0) {
  # Try partial matching if exact match fails
  found_genes <- grep("^malt[1-3]", rownames(logcpm_corrected), 
                      value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

if(length(found_genes) == 0) stop("STOP: Target genes not found.")

message(paste("Found genes:", paste(found_genes, collapse = ", ")))

target_data <- logcpm_corrected[found_genes, , drop = FALSE]

plot_df <- as.data.frame(target_data) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Gene, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "logCPM") %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Sample")

font_choice <- "Arial" 

# Statistical Testing

# Prepare design matrix for limma
design <- model.matrix(~0 + Tissue, data = metadata)
colnames(design) <- gsub("Tissue", "", colnames(design))

# Fit linear model
fit <- lmFit(target_data, design)

# Define contrasts (customize based on your comparisons of interest)
contrast.matrix <- makeContrasts(
  Liver_vs_Muscle = Liver - Muscle,
  Spleen_vs_Headkidney = Spleen - Headkidney,
  Gill_vs_Liver = Gill - Liver,
  levels = design
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast.matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

# Extract all results
results_all <- list()
for(i in 1:ncol(contrast.matrix)) {
  results_all[[colnames(contrast.matrix)[i]]] <- topTable(fit2, coef = i, number = Inf)
}

# Save statistical results
write.csv(do.call(rbind, lapply(names(results_all), function(x) {
  cbind(Comparison = x, Gene = rownames(results_all[[x]]), results_all[[x]])
})), "Statistical_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# Visualization 1: Violin + Boxplot with Statistics

p1 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = logCPM)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill = Tissue), alpha = 0.3, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Tissue), alpha = 0.7, width = 0.3, 
               outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Bioproject), width = 0.15, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) + 
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D", name = "Tissue") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "BioProject") +
  labs(
    title = "MALT Gene Expression Across Tissues",
    y = "Log2 CPM (Batch-Corrected)", x = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = font_choice) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right" 
  )

ggsave("Boxplot_Violin.png", plot = p1, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300)

print(p1)


# Visualization 2: Heatmap with Improved Annotations

annotation_col <- data.frame(
  Tissue = metadata$Tissue, 
  Bioproject = metadata$Bioproject
)
rownames(annotation_col) <- metadata$Sample

# Colors
tis_levels <- unique(metadata$Tissue)
tis_colors <- viridis(length(tis_levels), option = "D")
names(tis_colors) <- tis_levels 

proj_levels <- unique(metadata$Bioproject)
n_proj <- length(proj_levels)
proj_colors <- brewer.pal(max(3, n_proj), "Set1")[1:n_proj]
names(proj_colors) <- proj_levels 

ann_colors <- list(Tissue = tis_colors, Bioproject = proj_colors) 

# Z-score normalization (more interpretable than row scaling)
target_data_scaled <- t(scale(t(target_data)))

# Add informative column names
colnames(target_data_scaled) <- paste0(
  metadata$Tissue, "_", 
  gsub("PRJNA", "P", metadata$Bioproject),
  "_", 1:nrow(metadata)
)

# Save Individual Heatmap
pheatmap(target_data_scaled,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         scale = "none",  # Already scaled
         color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100), 
         cluster_rows = TRUE,   
         cluster_cols = TRUE,    
         show_colnames = FALSE,  
         border_color = NA,
         fontsize = 12,
         main = "Heatmap of MALT Orthologues (Z-scores)",
         filename = "Heatmap.png", 
         width = 11, height = 7
)

# Visualization 3: Dot Plot with Summary Statistics

summary_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Tissue, Gene) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Expression = mean(logCPM),
    SD_Expression = sd(logCPM),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

p3 <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = Gene)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Mean_Expression, fill = Mean_Expression), 
             shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.5) + 
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "magma", direction = -1, name = "Mean\nLog2 CPM") + 
  scale_size(range = c(4, 12), name = "Expression\nLevel") + 
  labs(title = "Mean Expression Summary", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_family = font_choice) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 12),
    legend.box = "vertical"
  )

ggsave("Dotplot.png", plot = p3, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Visualization 4: Gene Correlation Plot

if(length(found_genes) > 1) {
  gene_cor <- cor(t(target_data))
  
  png("Gene_Correlation.png", width = 800, height = 800, res = 150)
  corrplot(gene_cor, method = "circle", type = "upper", 
           tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45,
           addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 1.2,
           col = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100),
           title = "MALT Gene Correlation",
           mar = c(0, 0, 2, 0))
  dev.off()
}
null device 
          1 

# Visualization 5: Individual Gene Expression Patterns

p5 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = reorder(Sample, as.numeric(factor(Tissue))), y = logCPM, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = length(found_genes)) +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D") +
  labs(
    title = "Individual Sample Expression Profiles",
    y = "Log2 CPM (Batch-Corrected)", 
    x = "Sample"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = font_choice) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 11),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

ggsave("Sample_Expression_Barplot.png", plot = p5, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Grid Plot

# Prepare Boxplot (Clean up for grid)
p1_grid <- p1 + theme(
  axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
  legend.position = "none",
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
)

# Prepare Heatmap
heatmap_obj <- pheatmap(target_data_scaled,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         scale = "none",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100), 
         cluster_rows = TRUE,   
         cluster_cols = TRUE,    
         show_colnames = FALSE,  
         border_color = NA,
         fontsize = 10,
         main = "Hierarchical Clustering",
         silent = TRUE
)

p2_grob <- heatmap_obj$gtable
p2_grid <- wrap_elements(p2_grob)

# Prepare Dot Plot
p3_grid <- p3 + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# Combine all plots
final_grid <- p1_grid / (p2_grid + p3_grid) + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2)) + 
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = 'A', 
    title = "MALT Orthologue Expression Meta-Analysis",
    subtitle = "Note: Tissue and BioProject are perfectly confounded in this design",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30")
    )
  )

# Save Composite
ggsave("Final_Plot_Grid_Figure.png", plot = final_grid, width = 14, height = 11, dpi = 300)
